title: CRISIS RESOLUTION CENTER - 211info
text: CRISIS RESOLUTION CENTER CRISIS RESOLUTION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a co-occurring (mental health and addictions) treatment facility, specializing in providing secure psychiatric and addictions stabilization and respite services. 320 SW Ramsey Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Adults determined to have a chronic mental illness who are experiencing a psychiatric emergency and who may have co-occurring disorders Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 476-2373 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 476-2373 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for screening FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP and discounted and sliding-scale fees are available. Accepts private insurance on a case-by-case basis. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Josephine County Services: Adult Residential Treatment Facilities Crisis Residential Treatment Inpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities * Mental Health Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CRISIS RESOLUTION CENTER
